name: Unit21
description: Unit21 — No-code AML and fraud operations platform for transaction monitoring, case management, and SAR filing automation.

seo.title: Unit21 — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: Unit21: Unit21 — No-code AML and fraud operations platform for transaction monitoring, case management, and SAR filing automation.

when_to_use: No-code AML transaction monitoring rule builder for fintechs
SAR filing automation with narrative generation
Case management workflow for fraud investigation teams
Transaction risk scoring API for real-time payment decisioning
BSA/AML compliance platform for banking-as-a-service providers

pros: No-code rule building accessible to ops
Strong case management and SAR filing
Fast rollout vs legacy AML suites
Popular with US neobanks and crypto
cons: AML and ops focus, lighter on real-time fraud
Detection models less sophisticated than banks need
review.verdict: The cleanest modern AML ops platform for US fintechs, but pair it with fraud ML for full coverage.
review.best_for: US neobanks, crypto and payments teams modernizing AML ops and SAR workflows.
review.not_for: Tier-1 banks needing deep ML fraud detection and global regulator coverage.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
